name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state

(* State of each process: 1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"} *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Terminating == /\ UNCHANGED state

Next ==
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ state[i] = "idle"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ state[i] = "trying"
       /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ state[i] = "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
  \/ Terminating
vars == <<state>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Participants
VARIABLES state, votes, messages, finishedParticipants


\* \* ----------------------------------------------------------------
\* Type invariant
\* \* ----------------------------------------------------------------
Prepare ==
    /\ state = "idle"
    /\ state' = "preparing"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<votes, finishedParticipants>>
    /\ \A p \in Participants :
       /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT !["coordinator", p] = messages["coordinator", p] \cup {"Prepare"}]

VoteYes ==
    /\ state = "preparing"
    /\ \E p \in Participants :
        /\ messages["coordinator", p] = {"Prepare"}
        /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT !["coordinator", p] = {}]
        /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "yes"]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, finishedParticipants>>

VoteNo ==
    /\ state = "preparing"
    /\ \E p \in Participants :
        /\ messages["coordinator", p] = {"Prepare"}
        /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT !["coordinator", p] = {}]
        /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "no"]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, finishedParticipants>>

AllYes(v) == \A p \in Participants : v[p] = "yes"

Commit ==
    /\ state = "preparing"
    /\ AllYes(votes)
    /\ state' = "committing"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<votes, finishedParticipants>>
    /\ \A p \in Participants :
       /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT !["coordinator", p] = messages["coordinator", p] \cup {"Commit"}]

Abort ==
    /\ state = "preparing"
    /\ \E p \in Participants : votes[p] = "no"
    /\ state' = "aborting"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<votes, finishedParticipants>>
    /\ \A p \in Participants :
       /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT !["coordinator", p] = messages["coordinator", p] \cup {"Abort"}]

TypeOK ==
    /\ state \in {"idle", "preparing", "committing", "aborting", "finished"}
    /\ votes \in [Participants -> {"yes", "no", "none"}]
    /\ messages \in [Participants \cup {"coordinator"} -> [Participants \cup {"coordinator"} -> {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]]
    /\ finishedParticipants \subseteq Participants

\* \* ----------------------------------------------------------------
\* Initial state
\* \* ----------------------------------------------------------------
Init ==
    /\ state = "idle"
    /\ votes = [p \in Participants |-> "none"]
    /\ messages = [s \in Participants \cup {"coordinator"} |-> [r \in Participants \cup {"coordinator"} |-> {}]]
    /\ finishedParticipants = {}

\* \* ----------------------------------------------------------------
\* Helper predicates
\* \* ----------------------------------------------------------------
AllNo(v) == \A p \in Participants : v[p] = "no"

AllVoted(v) == \A p \in Participants : v[p] \in {"yes", "no"}

\* \* ----------------------------------------------------------------
\* Coordinator actions
\* \* ----------------------------------------------------------------
Finish ==
    /\ state \in {"committing", "aborting"}
    /\ \E p \in Participants :
        /\ messages["coordinator", p] = {"Commit"} \/ messages["coordinator", p] = {"Abort"}
        /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT !["coordinator", p] = {}]
        /\ finishedParticipants' = finishedParticipants \cup {p}
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, votes>>

AllFinished ==
    /\ finishedParticipants = Participants
    /\ state' = "finished"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<votes, messages>>

\* \* ----------------------------------------------------------------
\* Participant actions
\* \* ----------------------------------------------------------------
ReceivePrepare ==
    /\ \E p \in Participants :
        /\ messages[p, "coordinator"] = {"Prepare"}
        /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![p, "coordinator"] = {}]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, votes, finishedParticipants>>

SendVoteYes ==
    /\ \E p \in Participants :
        /\ messages[p, "coordinator"] = {}
        /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![p, "coordinator"] = {"VoteYes"}]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, votes, finishedParticipants>>

SendVoteNo ==
    /\ \E p \in Participants :
        /\ messages[p, "coordinator"] = {}
        /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![p, "coordinator"] = {"VoteNo"}]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, votes, finishedParticipants>>

ReceiveCommit ==
    /\ \E p \in Participants :
        /\ messages[p, "coordinator"] = {"Commit"}
        /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![p, "coordinator"] = {}]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, votes, finishedParticipants>>

ReceiveAbort ==
    /\ \E p \in Participants :
        /\ messages[p, "coordinator"] = {"Abort"}
        /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![p, "coordinator"] = {}]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, votes, finishedParticipants>>

\* \* ----------------------------------------------------------------
\* Next-state relation
\* \* ----------------------------------------------------------------
Next ==
    \/ Prepare
    \/ VoteYes
    \/ VoteNo
    \/ Commit
    \/ Abort
    \/ Finish
    \/ AllFinished
    \/ ReceivePrepare
    \/ SendVoteYes
    \/ SendVoteNo
    \/ ReceiveCommit
    \/ ReceiveAbort
    \/ UNCHANGED <<state, votes, messages, finishedParticipants>>

\* \* ----------------------------------------------------------------
\* Specification
\* \* ----------------------------------------------------------------
vars == <<state, votes, messages, finishedParticipants>>
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC, Integers

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES forkOwner, state

(* forkOwner[i] = j means fork i is owned by philosopher j; 
   forkOwner[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
(* state[i]  \in  {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Type constraints *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ forkOwner \in [0..N-1 -> -1..N-1]
    /\ state \in [0..N-1 -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Initial state: all forks free, all philosophers thinking *)
Init ==
    /\ forkOwner = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> -1]
    /\ state = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> "thinking"]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Helper definitions *)
left(i) == (i - 1) % N
right(i) == (i + 1) % N

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Actions *)

(* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
Hungry(i) ==
    /\ state[i] = "thinking"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
    /\ UNCHANGED forkOwner

(* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
TakeForks(i) ==
    /\ state[i] = "hungry"
    /\ forkOwner[left(i)] = -1
    /\ forkOwner[right(i)] = -1
    /\ forkOwner' = [forkOwner EXCEPT ![left(i)] = i, ![right(i)] = i]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

(* Philosopher i puts down forks *)
PutForks(i) ==
    /\ state[i] = "eating"
    /\ forkOwner[left(i)] = i
    /\ forkOwner[right(i)] = i
    /\ forkOwner' = [forkOwner EXCEPT ![left(i)] = -1, ![right(i)] = -1]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Termination (deadlock avoidance) *)
Terminate ==
    /\ UNCHANGED <<forkOwner, state>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \/ \E i \in 0..N-1: Hungry(i)
    \/ \E i \in 0..N-1: TakeForks(i)
    \/ \E i \in 0..N-1: PutForks(i)
    \/ Terminate

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Specification *)
vars == <<forkOwner, state>>
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

(* num[i] is the ticket number of process i (0..N-1)
   flag[i] is TRUE when process i is choosing a ticket *)
TypeOK == /\ num \in [0..N-1 -> 0..N]
          /\ flag \in [0..N-1 -> BOOLEAN]

Init == /\ num = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> FALSE]

(* Helper: maximum ticket currently held *)
maxNum == CHOOSE m \in 0..N : \E i \in 0..N-1 : num[i] = m

(* Next action for process i *)
Enter(i) ==
  /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<num>>
  /\ flag' = [flag' EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
  /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = maxNum + 1]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<flag>>

Exit(i) ==
  /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<flag>>

(* Mutual exclusion invariant *)
MutualExcl == \A i, j \in 0..N-1 : i # j =>
                \A k \in 0..N-1 : (num[i] < num[j]) \/ (num[i] = num[j] /\ i < j)

Next == \E i \in 0..N-1 :
          (Enter(i) \/ Exit(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>> /\ TypeOK

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size, prodState, consState

(* Types *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in [0..K-1 -> 0..K-1] \* mapping from indices to values
    /\ head \in 0..K-1
    /\ tail \in 0..K-1
    /\ size \in 0..K
    /\ prodState \in {"idle", "producing"}
    /\ consState \in {"idle", "consuming"}

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ q = [i \in 0..K-1 |-> 0]
    /\ head = 0
    /\ tail = 0
    /\ size = 0
    /\ prodState = "idle"
    /\ consState = "idle"

(* Producer action: enqueue a value v *)
Producer(v) == 
    /\ prodState = "idle"
    /\ size < K
    /\ prodState' = "producing"
    /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = v]
    /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % K
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ prodState' = "idle"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<head, consState>>

(* Consumer action: dequeue a value *)
Consumer == 
    /\ consState = "idle"
    /\ size > 0
    /\ consState' = "consuming"
    /\ head' = (head + 1) % K
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ consState' = "idle"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<tail, prodState>>

(* Termination disjunct to avoid deadlock *)
Terminating == 
    /\ UNCHANGED <<q, head, tail, size, prodState, consState>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \/ \E v \in 0..K-1 : Producer(v)
    \/ Consumer
    \/ Terminating

vars == <<q, head, tail, size, prodState, consState>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Majority
VARIABLES currentTerm, serverId, state, votedFor


(* Enumerated types for server states *)
StateEnum == {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ currentTerm \in 0..N
    /\ votedFor \in 0..N
    /\ state \in StateEnum
    /\ serverId \in 1..N

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ currentTerm = 0
    /\ votedFor = 0
    /\ state = "Follower"
    /\ serverId \in 1..N

(* Transition: become candidate *)
BecomeCandidate ==
    /\ state = "Follower"
    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
    /\ votedFor' = serverId
    /\ state' = "Candidate"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<serverId>>

(* Transition: receive vote from another server *)
ReceiveVote ==
    /\ state = "Candidate"
    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
    /\ votedFor' = votedFor
    /\ state' = "Candidate"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<serverId>>

(* Transition: become leader after Majority *)
BecomeLeader ==
    /\ state = "Candidate"
    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
    /\ votedFor' = votedFor
    /\ state' = "Leader"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<serverId>>

(* Transition: stay in current state (no change) *)
NoChange ==
    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state, serverId>>

Next ==
    \/ BecomeCandidate
    \/ ReceiveVote
    \/ BecomeLeader
    \/ NoChange

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state, serverId>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ readers \in 0..N
          /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ readers = 0
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

(* Reader actions *)
ReaderEnter == /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ readers' = readers + 1
              /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

ReaderExit == /\ readers > 0
             /\ readers' = readers - 1
             /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

(* Writer actions *)
WriterEnter == /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ readers = 0
              /\ writer_active' = TRUE
              /\ UNCHANGED readers

WriterExit == /\ writer_active = TRUE
             /\ writer_active' = FALSE
             /\ UNCHANGED readers

(* Termination disjunct to avoid deadlock *)
Terminating == /\ UNCHANGED <<readers, writer_active>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ ReaderEnter
       \/ ReaderExit
       \/ WriterEnter
       \/ WriterExit
       \/ Terminating

(* Specification *)
vars == <<readers, writer_active>>
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Channels
VARIABLES channelState, localState, markerReceived, markerSent, state

    /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "recording", "finished"}]
    /\ localState \in [1..N -> 0..N]
    /\ channelState \in [Channels -> 0..N]
    /\ markerSent \in [Channels -> BOOLEAN]
    /\ markerReceived \in [Channels -> BOOLEAN]

Init ==
    /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
    /\ localState = [p \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ channelState = [c \in Channels |-> 0]
    /\ markerSent = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]
    /\ markerReceived = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]

SendMarker(c) ==
    /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![c] = TRUE]
    /\ UNCHANGED << state, localState, channelState, markerReceived >>

ReceiveMarker(c) ==
    /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT ![c] = TRUE]
    /\ UNCHANGED << state, localState, channelState, markerSent >>

RecordState(p) ==
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "recording"]
    /\ localState' = [localState EXCEPT ![p] = localState[p] + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED << channelState, markerSent, markerReceived >>

FinishRecording(p) ==
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "finished"]
    /\ UNCHANGED << localState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived >>

SendMarkersAfterRecording(p) ==
    /\ \A c \in Channels : (c[0] = p) => SendMarker(c)
    /\ UNCHANGED << state, localState, channelState, markerReceived >>

Next ==
    \/ \E p \in 1..N :
        /\ state[p] = "idle"
        /\ RecordState(p)
    \/ \E p \in 1..N :
        /\ state[p] = "recording"
        /\ SendMarkersAfterRecording(p)
    \/ \E c \in Channels :
        /\ markerSent[c] = FALSE
        /\ markerReceived[c] = FALSE
        /\ SendMarker(c)
    \/ \E c \in Channels :
        /\ markerSent[c] = TRUE
        /\ markerReceived[c] = FALSE
        /\ ReceiveMarker(c)
    \/ \E p \in 1..N :
        /\ state[p] = "recording"
        /\ \A c \in Channels : (c[1] = p) => markerReceived[c]
        /\ FinishRecording(p)
    \/ Terminating = /\ UNCHANGED vars

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

vars == <<token>>

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == 
  /\ token' \in 1..N
  /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ token \in 1..N

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values
VARIABLES nextOpId, pending, store


(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
    /\ pending \in [Nat -> [opId: Nat, type: {"Put", "Get"}, key: Keys, value: Values \cup {"_"}]]
    /\ nextOpId \in Nat

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> VALUES[0]]
    /\ pending = [i \in 1..0 |-> <<>>]   \* empty set
    /\ nextOpId = 1

(* Helper to generate a new operation id *)
NewOpId ==
    LET id == nextOpId IN
    /\ nextOpId' = id + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<store, pending>>

(* Put operation: client sends a Put(k,v) request *)
Put(k, v) ==
    /\ k \in Keys
    /\ v \in Values
    /\ LET id == nextOpId IN
       pending' = [pending EXCEPT ![id] = [opId |-> id, type |-> "Put", key |-> k, value |-> v]]
    /\ nextOpId' = id + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED store

(* Get operation: client sends a Get(k) request *)
Get(k) ==
    /\ k \in Keys
    /\ LET id == nextOpId IN
       pending' = [pending EXCEPT ![id] = [opId |-> id, type |-> "Get", key |-> k, value |-> "_"]]
    /\ nextOpId' = id + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED store

(* Server processes the oldest pending operation *)

    /\ pending # [i \in 1..0 |-> <<>>]
    /\ LET ids == CHOOSE i \in DOMAIN pending IN pending[i].opId IN
       LET op == pending[ids] IN
       /\ IF op.type = "Put" THEN
            store' = [store EXCEPT ![op.key] = op.value]

            store' = store
       /\ pending' = [pending EXCEPT ![ids] = <<>>]
    /\ UNCHANGED nextOpId

(* Termination disjunct to avoid deadlock when no pending ops *)
Terminate ==
    /\ pending = [i \in 1..0 |-> <<>>]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<store, pending, nextOpId>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \/ Put(k, v)   \* any Put request
    \/ Get(k)      \* any Get request
    \/ Process     \* server processes an operation
    \/ Terminate   \* allow termination when idle

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<store, pending, nextOpId>>

====

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PaxosSpec ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, M, Values
VARIABLES acceptorState, chosenValue, proposerState


\* Types
TypeOK ==
    /\ acceptorState \in [1..N -> [state: {"idle", "prepare", "promise", "accept", "accepted"},
                                   promisedBallot: 0..N,
                                   acceptedBallot: 0..N,
                                   acceptedValue: Values \cup {0}]]
    /\ proposerState \in [1..M -> [state: {"idle", "prepare", "promise", "accept", "accepted"},
                                   ballot: 0..N,
                                   value: Values \cup {0}]]
    /\ chosenValue \in Values \cup {0}

\* Initial state
Init ==
    /\ acceptorState = [i \in 1..N |-> [state |-> "idle",
                                         promisedBallot |-> 0,
                                         acceptedBallot |-> 0,
                                         acceptedValue |-> 0]]
    /\ proposerState = [j \in 1..M |-> [state |-> "idle",
                                         ballot |-> 0,
                                         value |-> 0]]
    /\ chosenValue = 0

\* Proposer actions
Prepare(j) ==
    /\ proposerState[j].state = "idle"
    /\ proposerState' = [proposerState EXCEPT ![j].state = "prepare",
                                          ![j].ballot = CHOOSE b \in 1..N : TRUE,
                                          ![j].value = CHOOSE v \in Values : TRUE]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptorState, chosenValue>>

Promise(i, j) ==
    /\ acceptorState[i].state = "idle"
    /\ acceptorState[i].promisedBallot <= proposerState[j].ballot
    /\ acceptorState' = [acceptorState EXCEPT ![i].state = "promise",
                                            ![i].promisedBallot = proposerState[j].ballot]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<proposerState, chosenValue>>

Accept(i, j) ==
    /\ acceptorState[i].state = "promise"
    /\ acceptorState[i].promisedBallot = proposerState[j].ballot
    /\ acceptorState' = [acceptorState EXCEPT ![i].state = "accept"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<proposerState, chosenValue>>

Accepted(i, j) ==
    /\ acceptorState[i].state = "accept"
    /\ acceptorState[i].acceptedBallot = proposerState[j].ballot
    /\ acceptorState[i].acceptedValue = proposerState[j].value
    /\ acceptorState' = [acceptorState EXCEPT ![i].state = "accepted"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<proposerState, chosenValue>>

\* Chosen value action
Choose(j) ==
    /\ proposerState[j].state = "accepted"
    /\ chosenValue' = proposerState[j].value
    /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptorState, proposerState>>

\* Termination (no state change)
Terminate ==
    /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptorState, proposerState, chosenValue>>

Next ==
    \/ \E j \in 1..M : Prepare(j)
    \/ \E i \in 1..N : \E j \in 1..M : Promise(i, j)
    \/ \E i \in 1..N : \E j \in 1..M : Accept(i, j)
    \/ \E i \in 1..N : \E j \in 1..M : Accepted(i, j)
    \/ \E j \in 1..M : Choose(j)
    \/ Terminate

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptorState, proposerState, chosenValue>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC, Integers

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES ackedChunks, channelState, finished, retransmitCount, sentChunks

vars == <<ackedChunks, channelState, finished, retransmitCount, sentChunks>>

(* Type constraints for all variables *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ sentChunks \in 0..(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ ackedChunks \subseteq 0..(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ retransmitCount \in 0..MAX_RETRIES
    /\ channelState \in {"free", "busy"}
    /\ finished \in BOOLEAN

Init ==
    /\ sentChunks = 0
    /\ ackedChunks = {}
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ channelState = "free"
    /\ finished = FALSE

SendChunk ==
    /\ channelState = "free"
    /\ sentChunks < FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE
    /\ channelState' = "busy"
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks + 1
    /\ retransmitCount' = 0
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
    /\ finished' = finished

AckChunk ==
    /\ channelState = "busy"
    /\ channelState' = "free"
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks \cup {sentChunks}
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
    /\ finished' = finished

Retransmit ==
    /\ channelState = "busy"
    /\ channelState' = "free"
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
    /\ finished' = finished

GiveUp ==
    /\ channelState = "busy"
    /\ retransmitCount = MAX_RETRIES
    /\ channelState' = "free"
    /\ finished' = TRUE
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount

Terminate ==
    /\ finished
    /\ channelState' = channelState
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
    /\ finished' = finished

Next ==
    \/ SendChunk
    \/ AckChunk
    \/ Retransmit
    \/ GiveUp
    \/ Terminate

Spec == Init /\ TypeOK /\ [][Next]_vars

====

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolation ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS N, M, V
VARIABLES activeTx, data, snapshot, state, txId, writeSet


(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ state \in {"idle", "begin", "read", "write", "commit", "abort"}
    /\ txId \in 1..N \/ txId = 0
    /\ snapshot \in [1..M -> V] \/ snapshot = <<>>
    /\ data \in [1..M -> V]
    /\ writeSet \in [1..M -> V] \/ writeSet = <<>>
    /\ activeTx \in SUBSET 1..N

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ state = "idle"
    /\ txId = 0
    /\ snapshot = <<>>
    /\ data = [i \in 1..M |-> 0]
    /\ writeSet = <<>>
    /\ activeTx = <<>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Begin a transaction *)

    /\ state = "idle"
    /\ txId' \in 1..N
    /\ txId' \notin activeTx
    /\ snapshot' = data
    /\ writeSet' = <<>>
    /\ activeTx' = activeTx \cup {txId'}
    /\ state' = "begin"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<data, activeTx>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Read operation (no state change) *)
Read ==
    /\ state \in {"begin", "read"}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, txId, snapshot, data, writeSet, activeTx>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Write operation *)
Write ==
    /\ state \in {"begin", "read"}
    /\ writeSet' = [writeSet EXCEPT ![i] = v] \* v is a value from V
    /\ state' = "write"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, txId, snapshot, data, activeTx>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Commit operation *)
Commit ==
    /\ state = "write"
    /\ \A i \in 1..M :
          \E j \in activeTx \setminus {txId} :
              /\ writeSet[j][i] \in data[i] \* no conflicting write
    /\ data' = [i \in 1..M |-> IF writeSet[i] = 0 THEN data[i] ELSE writeSet[i]]
    /\ activeTx' = activeTx \setminus {txId}
    /\ state' = "commit"
    /\ txId' = 0
    /\ snapshot' = <<>>
    /\ writeSet' = <<>>
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, activeTx>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Abort operation *)
Abort ==
    /\ state \in {"begin", "read", "write"}
    /\ activeTx' = activeTx \setminus {txId}
    /\ state' = "abort"
    /\ txId' = 0
    /\ snapshot' = <<>>
    /\ writeSet' = <<>>
    /\ UNCHANGED <<data, activeTx>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Termination disjunct to avoid deadlock *)
Terminate ==
    /\ state = "idle"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, txId, snapshot, data, writeSet, activeTx>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \/ Begin
    \/ Read
    \/ Write
    \/ Commit
    \/ Abort
    \/ Terminate

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Specification *)
vars == <<state, txId, snapshot, data, writeSet, activeTx>>
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC, Integers

CONSTANTS N, E, MAX_DRIFT
VARIABLES clocks, offsets, round


(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Type invariant: all variables are finite and well-typed. *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ clocks \in [1..N -> 0..1000]
    /\ offsets \in [1..N -> -MAX_DRIFT..MAX_DRIFT]
    /\ round \in 0..1000

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Initial state: clocks start at 0, offsets are random within drift bounds, round = 0. *)
Init ==
    /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> RandomOffset]
    /\ round = 0

(* Helper: choose a random offset within drift bounds. *)
RandomOffset ==
    CHOOSE d \in -MAX_DRIFT..MAX_DRIFT : TRUE

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* One round of clock update and synchronization. *)
OneRound ==
    /\ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
        /\ offsets' = offsets
        /\ round' = round + 1
        /\ UNCHANGED <<clocks, offsets, round>> \* placeholder for other disjuncts

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Synchronization step: all nodes set their clocks to the average of all clocks. *)
Sync ==
    /\ let avg = (SUM i \in 1..N : clocks[i]) \div N
       in
       /\ clocks' = [i \in 1..N |-> avg]
       /\ offsets' = offsets
       /\ round' = round + 1
       /\ UNCHANGED <<clocks, offsets, round>> \* placeholder for other disjuncts

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Next-state relation: either perform a round or synchronize. *)
Next ==
    /\ OneRound
    \/ Sync
    \/ Terminating

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Termination: allow the system to stay in the same state. *)
Terminating ==
    /\ UNCHANGED <<clocks, offsets, round>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Specification: initial state and next-state relation. *)
vars == <<clocks, offsets, round>>
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N = 2

VARIABLES flag, turn

(* flag is a sequence of booleans indexed by 0..1 *)
(* turn is an integer 0..1 *)

vars == <<flag, turn>>

Init ==
    /\ flag = [i \in 0..1 |-> FALSE]
    /\ turn = 0

TypeOK ==
    /\ flag \in [0..1 -> BOOLEAN]
    /\ turn \in 0..1

Next ==
    \/ (* Process 0 enters critical section *)
       /\ flag[0] = FALSE
       /\ flag[1] = FALSE
       /\ turn = 0
       /\ flag[0] = TRUE
       /\ turn = 1
       /\ UNCHANGED <<flag[1], turn>>
    \/ (* Process 1 enters critical section *)
       /\ flag[0] = FALSE
       /\ flag[1] = FALSE
       /\ turn = 0
       /\ flag[1] = TRUE
       /\ turn = 0
       /\ UNCHANGED <<flag[0], turn>>
    \/ (* Process 0 exits critical section *)
       /\ flag[0] = TRUE
       /\ flag[1] = TRUE
       /\ turn = 1
       /\ flag[0] = FALSE
       /\ UNCHANGED <<flag[1], turn>>
    \/ (* Process 1 exits critical section *)
       /\ flag[0] = TRUE
       /\ flag[1] = TRUE
       /\ turn = 0
       /\ flag[1] = FALSE
       /\ UNCHANGED <<flag[0], turn>>
    \/ (* Termination disjunct to avoid deadlock *)
       /\ UNCHANGED vars

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Update

VARIABLES infected, round

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ infected \in SUBSET 1..N
          /\ round \in 0..N

(* Initial state: no node infected, round 0 *)
Init == /\ infected = {}
          /\ round = 0

(* Each round, one node is chosen to broadcast its infection status *)
Broadcast == /\ round' = round + 1
          /\ UNCHANGED infected

(* A node receives the Update and becomes infected *)
Infect == /\ round' = round + 1
          /\ infected' = infected \cup {Update}

(* Termination: allow the system to stay in the same state *)
Terminate == /\ UNCHANGED <<infected, round>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ Broadcast
        \/ Infect
        \/ Terminate

(* Specification *)
vars == <<infected, round>>
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PageAllocator ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Clients, Client, Pages
VARIABLES allocated, free

Nil == "nil"

TypeOK ==
    /\ free \in SUBSET Pages
    /\ allocated \in [Client -> SUBSET Pages]
    /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
    /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq free \cup allocated[c]
    /\ \A c1, c2 \in Clients: c1 # c2 => allocated[c1] # allocated[c2]

Init ==
    /\ free = Pages
    /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]
    /\ TypeOK

Request(c, p) ==
    /\ c \in Clients
    /\ p \in Pages
    /\ p \in free
    /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = Nil \union {p}]
    /\ free' = free \ {p}

Release(c, p) ==
    /\ c \in Clients
    /\ p \in Pages
    /\ p \in allocated[c]
    /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = Nil \ {p}]
    /\ free' = free \cup {p}

Terminating ==
    /\ UNCHANGED <<free, allocated>>

Next ==
    \/ \E c \in Clients : \E p \in Pages : Request(c, p)
    \/ \E c \in Clients : \E p \in Pages : Release(c, p)
    \/ Terminating

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS Topics, Subscribers, Publishers, MaxMsg
VARIABLES delivered, msgSeq, pubTopics, subTopics


(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ msgSeq \in [Topics -> [0..MaxMsg -> [publisher -> Publishers,
                                            topic -> Topics,
                                            content -> STRING]]]
    /\ subTopics \in [Subscribers -> SUBSET Topics]
    /\ pubTopics \in [Publishers -> SUBSET Topics]
    /\ delivered \in [Subscribers -> [Topics -> 0..MaxMsg]]

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ msgSeq = [t \in Topics |-> [i \in 0..MaxMsg |-> [publisher -> NULL,
                                                        topic -> t,
                                                        content -> ""]]]
    /\ subTopics = [s \in Subscribers |-> {}]
    /\ pubTopics = [p \in Publishers |-> {}]
    /\ delivered = [s \in Subscribers |-> [t \in Topics |-> 0]]

(* Action: subscriber registers interest in a topic *)
Register(sub, topic) ==
    /\ sub \in Subscribers
    /\ topic \in Topics
    /\ subTopics' = [subTopics EXCEPT ![sub] = subTopics[sub] \cup {topic}]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<msgSeq, pubTopics, delivered>>

(* Action: publisher declares ability to publish to a topic *)
Declare(pub, topic) ==
    /\ pub \in Publishers
    /\ topic \in Topics
    /\ pubTopics' = [pubTopics EXCEPT ![pub] = pubTopics[pub] \cup {topic}]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<msgSeq, subTopics, delivered>>

(* Action: publisher posts a new message on a topic *)
Post(pub, topic, content) ==
    /\ pub \in Publishers
    /\ topic \in Topics
    /\ pub \in pubTopics[pub]
    /\ LET idx == CHOOSE i \in 0..MaxMsg : msgSeq[topic][i][publisher] = NULL
       IN /\ idx \in 0..MaxMsg
          /\ msgSeq' = [msgSeq EXCEPT ![topic][idx] = [publisher -> pub,
                                                          topic -> topic,
                                                          content -> content]]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<subTopics, pubTopics, delivered>>

(* Action: broker delivers next message to a subscriber on a topic *)
Deliver(sub, topic) ==
    /\ sub \in Subscribers
    /\ topic \in Topics
    /\ topic \in subTopics[sub]
    /\ LET idx == delivered[sub][topic] + 1
       IN /\ idx \in 0..MaxMsg
          /\ msgSeq[topic][idx][publisher] # NULL
          /\ delivered' = [delivered EXCEPT ![sub][topic] = idx]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<msgSeq, subTopics, pubTopics>>

(* Termination disjunct to avoid deadlock *)
Terminate ==
    /\ UNCHANGED <<msgSeq, subTopics, pubTopics, delivered>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \/ \E sub \in Subscribers : \E topic \in Topics : Register(sub, topic)
    \/ \E pub \in Publishers : \E topic \in Topics : Declare(pub, topic)
    \/ \E pub \in Publishers : \E topic \in Topics : \E content \in STRING : Post(pub, topic, content)
    \/ \E sub \in Subscribers : \E topic \in Topics : Deliver(sub, topic)
    \/ Terminate

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<msgSeq, subTopics, pubTopics, delivered>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS N
VARIABLES turn, wants


(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ turn \in 0..1
          /\ wants \in [0..1 -> BOOLEAN]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants = [i \in 0..1 |-> FALSE]

(* Process 0's actions *)
P0 == /\ wants[0] = FALSE
      /\ wants[0] = TRUE
      /\ turn = 1
      /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants[1]>>

(* Process 1's actions *)
P1 == /\ wants[1] = FALSE
      /\ wants[1] = TRUE
      /\ turn = 0
      /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants[0]>>

(* Exit actions *)
Exit0 == /\ wants[0] = TRUE
          /\ wants[0] = FALSE
          /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants[1]>>

Exit1 == /\ wants[1] = TRUE
          /\ wants[1] = FALSE
          /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants[0]>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Terminating == /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants>>

(* Safety invariant: mutual exclusion *)

Next == \/ P0
        \/ P1
        \/ Exit0
        \/ Exit1
        \/ Terminating

(* Termination disjunct to avoid deadlock *)
Safety == \A i, j \in 0..1 : (i # j) => ~(wants[i] /\ wants[j])

(* Liveness invariant: each process eventually exits critical section *)
Liveness == \A i \in 0..1 : (wants[i] => <> ~wants[i])

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES counts

(* Type invariant: counts is a matrix of size N x N with entries in 0..N *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ counts \in [1..N -> [1..N -> 0..N]]
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: \A j \in 1..N: counts[i][j] \in 0..N

(* Initial state: all counts are zero *)
Init == 
    /\ counts = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> 0]]

(* Increment action: node i increments its own slot *)
Inc(i) == 
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![i][i] = counts[i][i] + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Merge action: node i merges its counts with node j *)
Merge(i, j) == 
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ j \in 1..N
    /\ i # j
    /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![i][k] = Max(counts[i][k], counts[j][k]) : k \in 1..N]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Termination disjunct to avoid deadlock *)
Terminating == UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N: Inc(i)
    \/ \E i, j \in 1..N: Merge(i, j)
    \/ Terminating

(* Global count: sum of maximums over all nodes *)
GlobalCount == 
    \E n \in 1..N: 
        LET maxVal == \E i \in 1..N: counts[i][n] IN
        \A n \in 1..N: maxVal

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
